meaning: n.小虫,臭虫,缺陷,错误;v.装置窃昕器,打扰
examples: I only did it to bug my parents.
The bug was caused by an error in the script.
He heard that they were planning to bug his office.
"It is starting to bug me, as I think the squad is good enough, " he said.
On April 5th, Microsoft announced a bug that is so stupid it defies belief.
